title: 素敵な世界に会いたくて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen upon Rice Shower outside the
academy gates. Curious, I ask where she's
headed.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm, I'm going out to buy a picture book.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself wondering what kind of picture
books Rice Shower normally reads.
choice_data_list: Do you mind if I tag along?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You want to come with me? I'd love that!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You want to come with me? I'd love that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having given me the green light, we head out
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when we arrive at the bookstore, we discover
the picture book is sold out.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm sorry, Big Brother... And after I brought you all the way here...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm sorry, Big Sister... And after I brought you all the way here...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really wanted to read that book...
choice_data_list: You really like picture books, huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. I always feel so calm when I read them...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Through those pages, I can explore different
worlds and learn so many wonderful things...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's why I get so excited when I find a new one
to read!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I was really excited today...
choice_data_list: Should we try checking out a different store?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no, I couldn't trouble you...
choice_data_list:
Well, you got me interested in seeing what
books you like to read.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no, I couldn't trouble you...
choice_data_list:
Well, you got me interested in seeing what
books you like to read.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...In that case, let's keep looking for a little bit
longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I check every nearby bookstore
we can think of. Then, just as the sun begins to
set...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Big Brother! Here it is! This is the book!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Big Sister! Here it is! This is the book!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're both excited to find one last copy at the
final store we visit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We read the picture book together after we buy
it, and I get an up-close look at her joyful face.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? R-reserving a copy? I wonder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We manage to reserve a copy, due to arrive in
the next shipment!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Big Brother! I never would have
thought to reserve a copy...
choice_data_list:
Seeing you so excited has me curious about this
book.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Big Sister! I never would have thought
to reserve a copy...
choice_data_list:
Seeing you so excited has me curious about this
book.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Then... let's read it together when it comes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Then... let's read it together when it comes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's face lights up, and I feel happiness
welling up inside myself too.
